title: cyrtosia integra
intro: Cyrtosia integra, also known as the Mountain Orchid or the Siam Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Southeast Asian medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cyrtosia integra include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Cyrtosia integra is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts have also been used in traditional herbal remedies.
